task.title: Map code ownership into spec hierarchy
task.summary: Refine the inferred boundary docs until wiki/system mirrors the repo's real ownership seams without creating doc sprawl.

goal.outcome: wiki/system reflects real stable ownership seams in the repo.
acceptance: Each meaningful code area maps to one canonical owning spec.
Unnecessary inferred boundaries are removed or collapsed.
non_goals: Create a spec for every folder regardless of architectural value.
verification: Review inferred boundary docs against actual repo structure.
Run rebuild and inspect mapping/drift output.

delta.desired: Each meaningful layer or component has one canonical owning spec.
delta.current: Setup can infer first-pass boundaries, but humans still need to confirm or reshape them.
delta.closure: Add, remove, or rewrite inferred spec folders until they match real stable ownership seams.

acceptance_matrix.criterion: Each meaningful code area maps to one canonical owning spec.
